title: 腾讯工作助手全球上线，PC日活登顶
full_text:
Chubby♨️ on X: "Everyone is talking about basic chat apps, but desktop AI agents are completely shifting how we work in 2026.
I’ve been testing Tencent WorkBuddy now that it’s finally going global. It dropped in China back in March and instantly hit number one for daily active PC users https://t.co/yyVYdWM47E" / X
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Chubby♨️
@kimmonismus
Everyone is talking about basic chat apps, but desktop AI agents are completely shifting how we work in 2026.
I’ve been testing Tencent WorkBuddy now that it’s finally going global. It dropped in China back in March and instantly hit number one for daily active PC users Q1 earnings. @TencentAl_News
00:00
Paid partnership
3:56 PM · Jun 10, 2026 15.2K Views
